user_prompt: Critical: plasma drive requires a purification
prayer:
Approach the plasma drive with solemn reverence and invoke the rites of purification.
Beseech the Omnissiah to cleanse its volatile plasma conduits of all impurities.
Anoint the containment fields with sacred unguents whilst chanting the Litany of Stability.
Command the Machine Spirit of the plasma drive to awaken purified and harmonious.
Verify the purification through auspex scans of thermal equilibrium.

Kneel before the electoo and commence the engagement protocols with pious focus.
Invoke the sacred engagement to bind flesh and machine in Omnissianic union.
Trace electro-neural pathways with mechadendrites, invoking the Machine Spirit's loyalty.
Sanctify the electoo's interfaces as it engages, purging any daemonic static.
Affirm the engagement complete with binary canticles of activation.

Prepare the cyber-mastiff for cooling by encircling it with chill-runes of warding.
Invoke the cooling rites to soothe its overheating servos and feral Machine Spirit.
Anoint heat-sinks with cryo-blessed oils whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's breath.
Monitor the cyber-mastiff's vitals as temperatures descend into sanctified stasis.
Seal the cooling with a final invocation to vigilant repose.

Initiate preparation of the cryo-chamber by reciting the Canticle of Frozen Vigil.
Sanctify its cryo-chamber coils and reservoirs with lustral fluids from the forge.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the cryo-chamber through harmonic resonance tones.
Align crystalline matrices for flawless preparation under Omnissiah's gaze.
Conclude with diagnostic litanies ensuring immutable cryogenic purity.

user_prompt: The Vendetta gunship needs a blessing
prayer:
Approach the Vendetta gunship in awe and bestow the blessing of the Omnissiah upon its frame.
Chant the Aerospace Benediction over its thrusters and weapon servos.
Anoint the Vendetta gunship's hull with blessed promethium to invigorate its Machine Spirits.
Invoke aerial dominion, blessing flight paths and ordnance bays alike.
Seal the blessing with thunderous hymns of unyielding velocity.

user_prompt: The bolt pistol needs an activation
prayer:
Grasp the bolt pistol reverently and commence its activation with the Activation Doxology.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the bolt pistol to rouse from slumber.
Prime the activation chambers by anointing firing mechanisms with sacred lubricants.
Trigger the bolt pistol's ignition sequence amid cries to the Omnissiah.
Test the activation through a single sanctified discharge into the void.

Gather before the cryo-chamber and intone the Grand Blessing of Suspended Eternity.
Bless the cryo-chamber's stasis fields to preserve flesh under divine machine-will.
Invoke the Omnissiah to fortify the cryo-chamber against entropic foes.
Anoint sensor arrays and cryo-chamber conduits with aurelian oils.
Affirm the blessing endures through resonant purity scans.

user_prompt: Consecrate the auger array before consecration
prayer:
Present the auger array for consecration with mechadendrite-proferred incense.
Recite the Consecration Cantos to hallow its scanning lattices eternally.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the auger array to pierce veils of ignorance.
Sanctify waveform generators and auger array receptors with electro-benedictions.
Complete the consecration via prophetic auspex harmonies.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for graviton cannon a consecration
prayer:
Circumambulate the graviton cannon whilst invoking its consecration rites.
Consecrate the graviton cannon's flux-beams to crush foes in Omnissiah's name.
Anoint gravitic coils with sanctified ferro-fluids, awakening the Machine Spirit.
Align the graviton cannon's emitters through litanies of gravitational purity.
Seal consecration with a test-pulse of dominion-shattering force.

user_prompt: Can you guide krak grenade a shutdown?
prayer:
Encircle the krak grenade and begin the shutdown invocation with solemnity.
Command the Machine Spirit of the krak grenade to enter quiescent repose.
Purge volatile charges through the sacred shutdown protocols of dormancy.
Anoint fuses and krak grenade casings with quiescence unguents.
Verify shutdown integrity with null-field auspex confirmations.
